title: Tick Control in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn | $125 – $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Affordable rates $125 – $325. Call today for fast service!
intro: Dyker Heights homeowners understand the importance of protecting their families and pets from tick infestations, especially with the neighborhood's abundance of private yards and proximity to Dyker Beach Park. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services tailored to the unique needs of Dyker Heights properties, from single-family homes to multi-unit dwellings. Our treatments range from $125 to $325 and effectively eliminate ticks while preventing future outbreaks.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Dyker Heights residents for years with proven tick elimination methods that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand Brooklyn's specific tick species and seasonal patterns, delivering targeted treatments that protect your outdoor spaces throughout the year.
localContext: Dyker Heights' tree-lined streets, spacious backyards, and proximity to green spaces like Dyker Beach Park create ideal habitats for ticks to thrive. The neighborhood's beautiful residential properties, famous for their elaborate holiday displays, require professional tick control to ensure families can safely enjoy their outdoor areas year-round.

faqs.question: What tick species are common in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Dyker Heights commonly sees deer ticks (blacklegged ticks), American dog ticks, and occasionally lone star ticks. Deer ticks are particularly concerning as they can carry Lyme disease. Our tick control services target all species found in Brooklyn and are especially effective in residential yards and properties near Dyker Beach Park.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Dyker Heights range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide ongoing protection throughout tick season (April through October). We'll provide a free inspection and quote for your specific property.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Dyker Heights typically runs from early spring through late fall, with peak activity from April through October. However, during mild winters, ticks can remain active year-round. We recommend preventative treatments beginning in early spring and continuing through the summer months for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our tick control treatments are EPA-approved and safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We use targeted application methods that focus on tick habitats like tall grass, shrubs, and yard perimeters. Pets and children can typically return to treated areas within 2-4 hours after application, and we provide specific safety guidelines with each service.
